name: INTERNATIONAL BANCSHARES CORP
business: International Bancshares Corporation (IBOC) is a multibank financial holding company that provides a diversified range of commercial and retail banking services. Its subsidiary banks serve customers in Texas and Oklahoma, including small- to medium-sized businesses, individuals, and international clients, particularly in Mexico. The company offers loans, deposits, letters of credit, foreign exchange, and other customary banking services.
sellsTo: commercial and retail customers in Texas and Oklahoma

exposures.sentence: The activity of financial technology companies (fintechs) has grown significantly over recent years and is expected to continue to grow.

As use of cryptocurrencies, blockchain technologies, and decentralized financial services gain broader regulatory approval, become more widely adopted by consumers, and become integrated into mainstream financial systems, we may be subject to additional competitive pressures from these alternative financial providers.
The financial-services industry is experiencing rapid technological change driven by the advancement of AI.
We may be adversely affected by declining crude oil prices.
If real estate values in our target markets decline, the loan portfolio would be impaired.
Our information systems may experience an interruption or breach in security.
Deposits from persons and entities domiciled in Mexico comprise a large and stable portion of the deposit base of the Subsidiary Banks.
